test_source: /mnt/media_tv/New Girl/Season 6/New Girl - S06E03 - Single and Sufficient WEBDL-720p.mkv (HEVC 720p, 1440kbps total, -ss 60 -t 30 -c copy => clean_src.mkv 34.16s)

vmaf_chain.fix_applied: fps lock REQUIRED on both [ref] and [enc] to avoid mkv 1/24000 vs mp4 1/1000 timebase walk-off

qsv_status_journey.step: first attempt on host Ubuntu stock ffmpeg 6.1.1
qsv_status_journey.result: FAIL: Failed to create a VAAPI device

qsv_status_journey.step: vpl-inspect shows ONE impl: legacy mfxhw64 1.35 only

qsv_status_journey.result: vpl-inspect now shows mfx-gen API 2.16, DeviceID e20b/0

qsv_status_journey.step: copy modern ffmpeg out of worker container to /usr/local/bin/ffmpeg-modern
qsv_status_journey.result: WORKS: av1_qsv encoder produces valid AV1 p010le output

variants.label: qsv_vbr_390k
variants.extra: extbrc=1 look_ahead=1 look_ahead_depth=100 b_strategy=1 adaptive_i=1 adaptive_b=1 bf=7 async_depth=4
variants.comment: matched-bitrate to NVENC P7 canary envelope

nvenc_reference.comment: production data across mixed content; not apples-to-apples single-clip comparison

vaapi_findings_archived.comment: VAAPI path tested and DEPRECATED. av1_vaapi ASIC ignores all software quality knobs (preset/qp/rc_mode/b_depth/tiles all no-op; only -b:v responds). Was a forced-pivot when QSV init failed before libmfx-gen install. QSV is the correct path.

conclusion: QSV path validated end-to-end on wakko Arc B580. At matched NVENC bitrate envelope (~390kbps), QSV VMAF Mean 88.22 vs NVENC production avg 90.48 — gap of -2.26. At ICQ q=23 (661kbps, 1.7x bits) QSV beats NVENC reference by +1.93. Pass criterion (+2.0 at matched filesize) needs further QSV knob tuning — try ICQ q=22 with explicit maxrate cap, or LA-VBR mode. Profile 2 (HQ tier) already viable at q=23 if HQ tier accepts the higher bitrate.
next_steps: Tune QSV knobs to close -2.26 gap at matched bitrate (try ICQ q=22 + maxrate cap)
Multi-clip shootout (extend EncoderShootout corpus: anime, live, fast-motion, low-light)
Add fps-lock to existing EncoderShootout.py harness (canonical VMAF chain fix)
Rebuild worker container image with proper Intel media stack so QSV transcodes can run inside container, not from host-side ffmpeg-modern
Schema migrations + GUI + claim predicate per directive plan (Phases B-K)
